title: The Deceased
overview: After visiting a fortune teller, Zulmira is informed that a blonde woman will threaten her peace. After talking to her husband Toninho, she suspects that her cousin Glorinha may be that blonde.

trailers.title: Trecho de A Falecida, de Leon Hirszman, 1965  [Picortando Filmes]
